bird.name: Bahama oriole
bird.summary: The Bahama oriole (Icterus northropi) is a species of songbird in the New World blackbird family Icteridae (the orioles). It is endemic to…

relations.subject: Bahama oriole
relations.evidence: The bigger threats, however, are continued habitat loss from human development, introduced predators (including cats, rats, dogs and hogs) and stochastic processes that, because of the oriole's small population size, increase the risk of extinction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
